'''âb-k-p-t''' ('''kabakpetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:timecode|timecode]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:timecode|timecode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-k-p-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabakpetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibakpetoko|thibakpetoko]] || [[word:jibakpetoko|jibakpetoko]] || [[word:shibakpetoko|shibakpetoko]] || [[word:kibakpetoko|kibakpetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubakpetoko|thuthubakpetoko]] || [[word:jujubakpetoko|jujubakpetoko]] || [[word:shushubakpetoko|shushubakpetoko]] || [[word:kukubakpetoko|kukubakpetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobakpetoko|thobakpetoko]] || [[word:jobakpetoko|jobakpetoko]] || [[word:shobakpetoko|shobakpetoko]] || [[word:kobakpetoko|kobakpetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobakpetoko|thobakpetoko]] || [[word:jobakpetoko|jobakpetoko]] || [[word:shobakpetoko|shobakpetoko]] || [[word:kobakpetoko|kobakpetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbakpetoko|thĂŠbakpetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbakpetoko|jĂŠbakpetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbakpetoko|shĂŠbakpetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbakpetoko|kĂŠbakpetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabakpetoko|thabakpetoko]] || [[word:jabakpetoko|jabakpetoko]] || [[word:shabakpetoko|shabakpetoko]] || [[word:kabakpetoko|kabakpetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabakpetoko|thabakpetoko]] || [[word:jabakpetoko|jabakpetoko]] || [[word:shabakpetoko|shabakpetoko]] || [[word:kabakpetoko|kabakpetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
